message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Actor1
participant ":Chantier" as Chantier
participant "jmb:Artisan" as Artisan
participant "q:Qualif" as Qualif
participant "real : Realiser" as Realiser
actor Actor2

Actor1 -> Chantier : getPayeArtisan(jmb)
activate Chantier

Chantier -> Artisan : q : getQualif()
activate Artisan
Artisan --> Chantier
deactivate Artisan

Chantier -> Qualif : tauxH getTauxH()
activate Qualif
Qualif --> Chantier
deactivate Qualif

loop [ForEach real]
    Chantier -> Realiser : a = getArtisan()
    activate Realiser
    Realiser --> Chantier
    deactivate Realiser

    opt [a == jmb]
        Chantier -> Realiser : d = getDuree()
        activate Realiser
        Realiser --> Chantier
        deactivate Realiser

        Chantier -> Chantier : duree += d
    end
end

Chantier -->> Actor1 : duree*tauxH
deactivate Chantier

@enduml
```
